hooks.command: echo "[CRUZ EVOLUTION] Session started. Learned rules: $(wc -l < .claude/memory/learned-rules.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0) lines. Corrections logged: $(wc -l < .claude/memory/corrections.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo 0). Violations logged: $(wc -l < .claude/memory/violations.jsonl 2>/dev/null || echo 0). READ .claude/memory/learned-rules.md BEFORE STARTING WORK. RUN VERIFICATION SWEEP ON ALL RULES WITH verify: LINES."
echo "[CRUZ] Before editing: check path-scoped rules in .claude/rules/. Check learned-rules.md. Verify design system tokens. Confirm RLS if touching Supabase."
echo "[CRUZ] Session ending. Log corrections and observations to .claude/memory/. Write session scorecard to sessions.jsonl. Check if any learned rules need verify: lines added."
